If a question is raised as to whether a patient is confined to the home, the HHA will be 
requested to furnish the Medicare contractor with the information necessary to establish 
that the patient is homebound as defined above. 

30.1.2 - Patient's Place of Residence 
(Rev. 265, Issued: 01-10-20, Effective: 01-01-20, Implementation: 02-11-20) 

A patient's residence is wherever he or she makes his or her home. This may be his or 
her own dwelling,
